description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser toppling metamagic rod 3,000 gp Toppling metamagic rod 11,000 gp Greater toppling metamagic rod 24,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells with the force descriptor per day that are affected as though the spells were augmented with the Toppling Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Toppling Spell; Cost varies Cost varies by specific type: Lesser toppling metamagic rod 1,500 gp Toppling metamagic rod 5,500 gp Greater toppling metamagic rod 12,250 gp
